horoscope: You may gravitate to people, projects, and ideas that feed your spirit, dear Aries, rather than drain you of energy. Transits today give you a mission. Teaming up can be effective for accomplishing your goals. A friendship or incoming news can significantly alter your perspective on a matter. You might support others with helpful advice or communicate with great interest and appeal, boosting a sense of connection. Your ability to get to the point or your straightforwardness works in your favor, and you're both taken seriously and communicating effectively. As such, you're gaining a solid sense of your priorities. Getting organized comes naturally to you now. Connections and conversations inspire trust. You seem to be able to bring out the best in others right now. In turn, you’re appealing to many people.

Today’s Sun-Pluto harmony motivates you to take charge and make improvements, dear Taurus, particularly of your finances or belongings. You stand to gain fascinating insight into people and projects in your life. Any consulting or counseling efforts can be fruitful now. Your influence is strong, both professionally and personally. With a stronger sense of your most important goals, it’s easier to identify the best steps to get you closer to achieving them. You can come up with some great ideas about making money or doing business, and work spent on individual or private projects can benefit you greatly. You may be motivated to complete a project you've left unfinished.

You're in good shape for both cooperation and independent action today, dear Gemini. You're more appreciative of a logical, orderly approach to your world at the moment. Today’s transits help boost your confidence, putting you in a good position to firm up your creations or plans. Favored now are communication, learning, relationships, and sharing. It’s an excellent time to gain backers or supporters, and incredible energy is with you to enjoy your relationships or work on resolving problems, as positive changes can result. You’re also well-positioned for self-renewal through activities that feed your spirit. There may be good news or recognition, and ideas are golden! Let your ideas develop slowly for best results.

You see the value of putting more order into your life or eliminating waste today, dear Cancer. At the same time, insights can come quite magically, particularly if you listen to your inner guide rather than pressure your mind. As such, the day can be rich for both practical and emotional matters. In fact, you could be feeling a sense of mission now. Today's transits help you gain a better understanding of your inner workings, needs, and desires. Supporting others lifts your spirits, and self-honesty and heightened perception are themes. If you need to quit a bad habit, this can be a good time to gain the motivation you need. You’re identifying priorities and opportunities. On an emotional level, this is a great time to take charge and tap into your inner courage. You may be facing a fear, kicking a bad habit, or vowing to improve your close relationships.

Your willingness to resolve problems comes to the fore today, dear Leo. Whether you gain new insight into your desires or bond with someone important to you through an honest discussion, the focus is on improving your life and committing to positive changes. It's a fine time to center yourself and use your energy creatively. Today’s transits tend to boost you up socially and materially. You could find ways to put your talents to good use, and people in your life are likely to see your value more than usual. Friends are supportive and your biggest fans today. Emotional energy is intense today, but also readily mastered and channeled into satisfying activities. Focus on health, balance, and spirit now for the best results.

You can feel quite satisfied with putting a plan into motion, dear Virgo. It's an ideal time for healing, particularly if you aim to let go of emotional baggage, but your ambition is pleasantly stirring as well. Business matters benefit from strategizing and planning today. A conversation may be integral to getting yourself into a very positive, can-do frame of mind today. In fact, you can feel a stronger sense of purpose now. You might receive a boost or help from a higher-up or an associate. Quick fixes are not of interest, as you want to go deep and make meaningful changes. You can feel more determined than usual to reach your goals, whether professional, work-related, or health-related. It can be a time for feeling especially good about your services, leadership, or objectives. You might also find others are putting more faith in you.

Your confidence in a relationship or special person in your life is likely to strengthen today, dear Libra. Even if you don't use it, you're interested in someone's input right now, since enjoying company is what it's about! You may be pulling into yourself for some much-needed introspection in some ways, but it's also a powerful time for your interactions. You're patient with others, and there can be some restoring of faith through practical help or kind gestures and offers. Today’s energies benefit your love life, communications, and teamwork. It’s easier than usual to muster up support and cooperation. People in your life can shift your perspective in eye-opening, helpful ways, or a movie, book, news, or cultural experience could lead to a new interest. You could be embracing a different philosophy or taking an exciting, enlightening approach to a matter.

You'll find that people are more inclined to act than react today, dear Scorpio, which creates a healthy and smooth flow of energy. Excellent energy is with you for being productive and focusing on priorities. It can be a strong time for building your health, both mental and physical, or for making your daily routine work for you. You’re in the mood to make deep rather than surface changes, and it’s a beautiful time to improve your personal life. If you need support or assistance with domestic pursuits, this can be an excellent time to seek it out. In turn, people appreciate your advice and opinion.

Feelings flow smoothly today, dear Sagittarius, and you may find it especially easy to strike up a conversation or to express yourself and your needs. You're in good shape to find the motivation to get things done through a relationship or a particular person. The fact that others can rely on you is in the spotlight and desirable. Pairing up to accomplish something important to you is also favored now. Current transits seem to put you in the right place for reinforcement, support, or recognition. You may be looking for a higher meaning to what you’re doing. People appreciate your focus and passion, and you are communicating very persuasively. Your dedication is impressive and shows itself in whatever you do. It’s also a good time to find ways to free yourself of unnecessary mental burdens–you have improvements in mind!

Today is good for feeling not quite so bound by emotions, dear Capricorn, and for taking more interest in making things happen. Second-guessing yourself or things may have been exhausting recently, and now, problems are more readily solved. Your priorities seem pleasantly clear. Putting your domestic life in order may be attractive, as you see it as the first step for making important changes. You're on a mission to feel more organized, in control, and on top of your life. The day seems to readily support growing, improving, and moving on. You’re in perfect shape to explore ways to improve your money situation, income, work, or health. A Sun-Pluto trine helps you pull things together and get things running smoothly.

You can be exceptionally resourceful today, dear Aquarius. Creative urges are strong, and the compulsion to do something with them is building. A bit of healthy competition can be highly motivating now. You recognize the value of some discipline, or you have the opportunity to see the benefits of your hard work, planning, and effort. You want to feel useful and organized, and putting something into order can be most attractive to that end. A strengthening aspect connects the Sun in your creative sector with Pluto in your sign and is powerful for creative self-expression. With this influence, you more readily see your priorities. Sharing your ideas, artistic vision, happiness, and sense of humor can be in focus. There may be a boost or recreational activity that’s healing and rewarding. Having the courage to express yourself honestly with someone can help take a relationship to the next level. This transit strengthens your confidence.

Family-oriented work or work around the home can be especially satisfying and beneficial right now, dear Pisces. Today is also useful for taking small steps to improve relationships, both with family and with bosses or authority figures. You want to know that you're on top of things, especially regarding money, home, family, and security matters, and you can be in an excellent position to make reinforcements now. With the Sun and Pluto harmonizing, you can feel encouraged and motivated to make profound improvements and changes rather than quick or surface fixes in these areas or in your inner world. You might shift your perspective on a matter, and it feels empowering or relieving! There can be rewarding family connections or a lifestyle change that feels right. Connecting more deeply with someone can figure strongly now.
